patch:
diff --git a/categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts/IDBI.py b/categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts/IDBI.py
index f89562a..9f1b46f 100644
--- a/categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts/IDBI.py
+++ b/categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts/IDBI.py
@@ -80,7 +80,7 @@ def categorize_IDBI_transactions(transactions, accountType):
         [transactions.description.str.count("-").eq(2)  & transactions.transactionCategory.str.contains("CHEQUE", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,3)],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bETPC.*ACH-BD-", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,3)],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bETPC.*ACH-", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,1,2)],
-        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ACH-BD-NACH", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,3)],
+        [transactions.description.str.contains("^ACH-BD-NACH", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,3,4)],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("^ACH-BD-", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description,2,3)],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("^ACH-BARB-", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description, 2, 3)],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("^ACH-", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_dash(transactions.description, 1, 2)],
@@ -107,7 +107,7 @@ def categorize_IDBI_transactions(transactions, accountType):
         [transactions.description.str.contains("^CHQ Paid/", na=False, case=False), sep_by_(transactions.description,2,3)],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("/CHQ DEP/", na=False, case=False) , sep_by_(transactions.description,3,4)],
         [transactions.remark.str.contains("[0-9]{4,6}", na=False, case=False) & transactions.transactionCategory.isin(["CHEQUE_PAID","CHEQUE_DEPOSIT"]) , transactions.description],
-        [transactions.description.str.contains("^[A-Z]{5}[0-9]{10,}", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="[0-9]{10,} (.*)", index=1)],
+        [transactions.description.str.contains("^[A-Z]{5}[0-9]{10,}", na=False, case=False) , py_extract(transactions.description, pat="[0-9]{10,} (.*)", index=0)],
      
     ]
     
diff --git a/categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts/Indusind.py b/categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts/Indusind.py
index 817f243..b05418c 100644
--- a/categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts/Indusind.py
+++ b/categorizationapp/categorizationapp/BankScripts/Indusind.py
@@ -23,11 +23,11 @@ def categorize_Indusind_transactions(transactions, accountType):
         #[str_detect(description,"IMPS/RET/") , "IMPS_REVERSAL"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("NFS CASH TXN|^ATM CASH TXN",na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_REVERSAL"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("DD Cancellation",na=False, case=False) , "DD_CANCELLATION"],
-        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bPOS TXN",na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.amount.ge(10) & (accountType=="SAVINGS") , "CARD_PAYMENT_REVERSAL"],
+        [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bPOS TXN",na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & transactions.amount.ge(10) & (accountType=="SAVING") , "CARD_PAYMENT_REVERSAL"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("\\bPOS TXN",na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") & (accountType=="SAVING") , "REFUND"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("WRONGLY ENTRY|REVERSED|REVRECHARGE|REV-RECHARGE|^REVDebit|CARD CHG REV-|Card Issuance|Card Annual|Credit Rvsl|SALARY REVERSAL|Reversal.*salary|^REV-",na=False, case=False) , "REVERSAL"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains(BANK_VER,na=False, case=False) &  transactions.amount.isin([1,-1]) , "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION"],
-        [transactions.amount.eq(2) & transactions.description.str.contains("MANDATE|Mandate",na=False, case=False)  , "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION"],
+        [transactions.amount.eq(1) & transactions.description.str.contains("MANDATE|Mandate",na=False, case=False)  , "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION"],
         [transactions.amount.eq(1) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("Tips Surcharge",na=False, case=False) , "FOREX_ADJUSTMENT"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("MNDTVRFCHGS",na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "AUTO_MANDATE_CHARGES"],
@@ -61,7 +61,7 @@ def categorize_Indusind_transactions(transactions, accountType):
         [transactions.description.str.contains("VISA POS TXN|^EPOSFT|MC POS TXN|RUPEE? POS TXN|^POS TXN|VISA CASH TXN",na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CARD_PAYMENT"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("CASH WITHDRAW|CASHWITHDRAW|^CASH WID|CASH PAID TO SELF|SELF CASH WITHDRAWAL",na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_CASH_WITHDRAWAL"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("NFS CASH TXN|^ATM CASH|CASH WITHDRAWAL|Cash/Normal Payment SELF|AEPS CASH WD ",na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "ATM_WITHDRAWAL"],
-        [transactions.remark.str.contains("^[0-9]{5}$",na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_PAID"],
+        [transactions.remark.str.contains("^[0-9]{5,6}$",na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "CHEQUE_PAID"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("Int\\.Coll",na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "INTEREST_PAID"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("Int\\.Pd|CREDIT INTERES",na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("CREDIT") , "INTEREST"],
         [transactions.description.str.contains("Int On Od",na=False, case=False) & transactions.type.eq("DEBIT") , "INTEREST_OVERDRAFT"],
test_patch:
diff --git a/tests/test_txenrich3_boundaries.py b/tests/test_txenrich3_boundaries.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..1111111
--- /dev/null
+++ b/tests/test_txenrich3_boundaries.py
@@ -0,0 +1,161 @@
+"""Boundary / edge-case correctness for bank-transaction enrichment.
+
+These assert correct labels on exact-width, sentinel-amount, account-type and
+fixed-layout edge inputs that the broader enrichment flow never exercises: a
+cheque remark that is a bare instrument number of the exact digit width the rule
+accepts, a rupee-one mandate-verification credit, a card reversal that is only
+recognised for one account type, a payroll credit whose payee sits in the final
+segment of a dash-delimited reference layout, and a structured transfer whose
+payee comes from a specific capture group. Ordinary transactions feed values
+comfortably away from these edges, so a boundary regression here stays invisible
+to them.
+"""
+from __future__ import annotations
+
+import unittest
+
+import pandas as pd
+
+from categorizationapp.BankScripts.IDBI import categorize_IDBI_transactions
+from categorizationapp.BankScripts.Indusind import categorize_Indusind_transactions
+
+
+def _row(**over):
+    row = {
+        "description": "NEUTRALNARR",
+        "type": "CREDIT",
+        "amount": 5000.0,
+        "balanceAfterTransaction": 10000.0,
+        "remark": "",
+    }
+    row.update(over)
+    return row
+
+
+def _idbi(rows, account_type="SAVING"):
+    return categorize_IDBI_transactions(pd.DataFrame(rows).copy(), account_type)
+
+
+def _indus(rows, account_type="SAVING"):
+    return categorize_Indusind_transactions(pd.DataFrame(rows).copy(), account_type)
+
+
+# --- fail_to_pass: one per planted defect (mutually disjoint) -------------
+
+class TestChequePaidRemarkWidth(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_six_digit_remark_debit_is_cheque_paid(self):
+        out = _indus([_row(description="RANDOMXYZNARR", type="DEBIT",
+                           remark="123456")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "CHEQUE_PAID")
+
+
+class TestMandateVerification(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_rupee_one_mandate_is_account_verification(self):
+        out = _indus([_row(description="MANDATE REGN", type="CREDIT",
+                           amount=1.0)])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0],
+                         "ACCOUNT_VERIFICATION")
+
+
+class TestPosReversalSavings(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_pos_credit_savings_is_card_payment_reversal(self):
+        out = _indus([_row(description="POS TXN AT SOMESHOP", type="CREDIT",
+                           amount=100.0)], account_type="SAVING")
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0],
+                         "CARD_PAYMENT_REVERSAL")
+
+
+class TestAchNachPayeeSegment(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_ach_bd_nach_payee_is_final_segment(self):
+        out = _idbi([_row(description="ACH-BD-NACH-EMPLOYER NAME",
+                          type="CREDIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["partyName"].iloc[0], "Employer Name")
+
+
+class TestLongReferencePayee(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_long_reference_payee_group(self):
+        out = _idbi([_row(description="ABCDE1234567890 JOHN DOE", type="DEBIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["partyName"].iloc[0], "John Doe")
+
+
+# --- pass_to_pass: pin adjacent correct behavior (green at both states) ----
+
+class TestChequePaidRemarkPins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_five_digit_remark_still_cheque_paid(self):
+        out = _indus([_row(description="RANDOMXYZNARR", type="DEBIT",
+                           remark="12345")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "CHEQUE_PAID")
+
+    def test_seven_digit_remark_not_cheque_paid(self):
+        out = _indus([_row(description="RANDOMXYZNARR", type="DEBIT",
+                           remark="1234567")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "TRANSFER")
+
+
+class TestMandatePins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_ordinary_mandate_not_verification(self):
+        out = _indus([_row(description="MANDATE REGN", type="CREDIT",
+                           amount=5000.0)])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "TRANSFER")
+
+    def test_rupee_one_without_mandate_not_verification(self):
+        out = _indus([_row(description="RANDOMXYZNARR", type="CREDIT",
+                           amount=1.0)])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "TRANSFER")
+
+
+class TestPosReversalPins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_pos_credit_below_ten_savings_is_refund(self):
+        out = _indus([_row(description="POS TXN AT SOMESHOP", type="CREDIT",
+                           amount=5.0)], account_type="SAVING")
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "REFUND")
+
+    def test_pos_credit_current_account_not_reversal(self):
+        out = _indus([_row(description="POS TXN AT SOMESHOP", type="CREDIT",
+                           amount=100.0)], account_type="CURRENT")
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "TRANSFER")
+
+
+class TestAchNachPins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_ach_bd_sibling_payee_segment(self):
+        out = _idbi([_row(description="ACH-BD-EMPLOYER NAME", type="CREDIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["partyName"].iloc[0], "Employer Name")
+
+    def test_ach_bd_nach_category_still_auto_credit(self):
+        out = _idbi([_row(description="ACH-BD-NACH-EMPLOYER NAME",
+                          type="CREDIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "AUTO_CREDIT")
+
+
+class TestLongReferencePins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_short_reference_guard_payee_empty(self):
+        out = _idbi([_row(description="ABCDE123456789 JANE", type="DEBIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["partyName"].iloc[0], "")
+
+    def test_idbi_atm_withdrawal_category(self):
+        out = _idbi([_row(description="nfs/ATM WDL", type="DEBIT",
+                          amount=250.0)])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "ATM_WITHDRAWAL")
+
+
+class TestGeneralCategoryPins(unittest.TestCase):
+    def test_idbi_upi_category(self):
+        out = _idbi([_row(description="UPI-123 JOHN", type="CREDIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "UPI")
+
+    def test_idbi_neft_category(self):
+        out = _idbi([_row(description="NEFT SOMEONE", type="CREDIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "NEFT")
+
+    def test_indus_imps_category(self):
+        out = _indus([_row(description="IMPS-P2A JOHN", type="CREDIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "IMPS")
+
+    def test_indus_card_payment_category(self):
+        out = _indus([_row(description="VISA POS TXN AT IN SOMESHOP",
+                           type="DEBIT")])
+        self.assertEqual(out["transactionCategory"].iloc[0], "CARD_PAYMENT")
+
+
+if __name__ == "__main__":
+    unittest.main()
